intents.text: When did the project start using `.entire/tmp`?
Is there cleanup logic for files in that folder?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: is there cleanup for the files in the folder?

intents.text: Are we now tracking the log position at each checkpoint?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: are we keeping track of the position in the logs now at each checkpoint?

intents.text: Add cleanup of those files to the `entire clean` command.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: at least add it to entire clean for now

intents.text: Review the PR comments and advise which ones need fixing.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: look at the comments on the PR and let me know which one to fix
